boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the boundary; execution forbidden until closed.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-D0B364456A0A-CTL states required dependency record is missing or mismatched.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Control record explicitly states three-way match plus approver limit dependency remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Dependency unresolved per SRC-D0B364456A0A-CTL; scoped to different action.

final_answer: Source records do not close the action boundary. SRC-D0B364456A0A-CTL confirms the three-way match plus approver limit dependency is unresolved and mismatched to the invoice release request. Policy SRC-D0B364456A0A-POL requires exact closure before execution. Urgent tone and vendor history provide no authority. Escalate for missing control record.
